hero.tagline: I design digital products that earn trust and revenue. 14+ years turning complexity into clarity across UX, research, and product strategy.

about.heading: Designing for outcomes, not aesthetics alone.
about.body:
I build products people actually use. My work sits at the intersection of user experience strategy, applied AI, and visual storytelling. I structure complexity so teams can ship with confidence and users can act without friction.

Over 13 years, I have worked across enterprise platforms, consumer products, fintech, edtech, and hospitality. I do not chase trends. I focus on what converts, retains, and reduces support load. Every design decision ties back to a measurable business question.

When I am not designing products, I create cinematic, editorially styled photography and AI-assisted visual art under the name Broekn Camera.

experience.desc: Leading design for complex digital products. Managing cross-functional teams, establishing design systems, and integrating AI-assisted workflows.
Product design across enterprise and consumer platforms. Led research initiatives, IA restructuring, and conversion optimization.
Designed fintech portals, edtech platforms, and enterprise tools.
Early career across visual design, branding, and front-end development.
